meta.title: A Conversation with Assistant Special Envoy Ellie Cohanim on Combating Anti-Semitism
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a conversation with U.S. Assistant Special Envoy to Monitor and Combat Anti-Semitism Ellie Cohanim on the challenges the United States faces in turning the tide on global anti-Semitism. The conversation will be hosted by Hudson Director for South and Central Asia Husain Haqqani.
